Title: Buruma ga abunai!! Sûshinchû wa Furîza no te ni
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Bulma dreams that Vegeta kills her; Vegeta ponders how to get the last dragon ball; Frieza loses his temper and fires random energy blasts; Krillin and Gohan fly toward Guru; Bulma tries to retrieve the dragon ball, which she lose...
